row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: The ego vehicle is navigating a curved road to the right, maintaining a steady forward trajectory.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A white car is visible on the left side in the early frames, appearing stationary or moving slowly relative to the ego path.

semantic.scene_summary: A real-world driving scene showing a paved road curving to the right through a built-up area with buildings and vegetation. The weather appears overcast.
semantic.visibility_notes: Visual clarity is consistent with standard camera footage. Objects are distinct and well-defined.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion is smooth and continuous. The perspective changes naturally as the vehicle follows the curve of the road.
logical.object_continuity: Objects such as the white car and roadside structures remain stable and do not flicker or disappear unexpectedly.
logical.structure_continuity: The road geometry and surrounding environment maintain physical consistency throughout the sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curved road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions are visually apparent. The scene is clear for navigation.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated simulation of the same driving scene. It depicts a road curving right with similar building and vegetation elements.
semantic.visibility_notes: Images exhibit significant blurring and warping. Object boundaries are soft and often indistinct compared to the reference.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Temporal consistency is degraded. There is noticeable flickering and morphing of textures, particularly on the road surface and foliage.
logical.object_continuity: The white car on the left appears unstable, changing shape and position unnaturally between frames. Some objects seem to merge with the background.
logical.structure_continuity: Structural integrity is compromised; buildings and poles appear to bend or warp slightly, indicating generative artifacts rather than rigid physical reality.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego motion trend mimics the forward movement along the curve, but the visual feedback is noisy.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability is significantly reduced due to artifacts. While no explicit collision is shown, the instability makes reliable decision interpretation difficult.

missing_or_weakened_elements: Clear definition of traffic signs and markings
Distinct separation between foreground and background
newly_introduced_elements: Flickering textures on the road surface
artifacts_or_instabilities: Unnatural deformation of the white car
Loss of structural rigidity in buildings
